title: Grameenphone introduces ‘One’ digital ecosystem
description: Grameenphone has launched "Grameenphone One", a new initiative aimed at transforming the company from a traditional telecom operator into a comprehensive digital service provider. The move is designed to redefine customers' daily digital experiences with a suite of new, innovative services.

title: Grameenphone forecasts Q1 revenue dip amid Middle East tensions
description: The company noted that further details regarding its performance will be disclosed in its official Q1 2026 financial report.
